title: AI infrastructure race will be won on power, edge and resilience, not just compute: WEF
snippet: Over the next 3-5 years, the AI infrastructure battle will shift from the approach around getting bigger GPUs to the ability to balance distributed inference, manage energy constraints, and resilience at scale, the World Economic Forum said in a research report.
